final-neighborhood-resource-guide-histor.label: Final Capstone: Neighborhood Guide History
final-neighborhood-resource-guide-histor.summary: Build a fresh neighborhood-guide repository through six cumulative capstone steps.

try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.title: Clean Tracked Paths and Recover a Mistake
Commit and Audit the Final Handoff
Initialize and Record the Baseline
try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.prompt: Inside `neighborhood-guide/`, type `git init -b main` and press Enter. Type `git config --local user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner"` and press Enter. Type `git config --local user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local"` and press Enter. Type `git add README.md pages/welcome.html pages/contact.txt notes/old-phone-tree.txt` and press Enter. Then type `git commit -m "Start neighborhood guide"` and press Enter.
try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.hint: Reapply the complete first-snapshot workflow in the fresh capstone folder.

help.concept: The capstone starts independently; the files are supplied, but the Git workflow is yours to apply.
help.hint_1: Use main and the exact local identity.
help.hint_2: Use the exact first commit message.

try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.starterCode:
# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and contact information.
try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.solutionCode:
git init -b main
git config --local user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner"
git config --local user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local"
git add README.md pages/welcome.html pages/contact.txt notes/old-phone-tree.txt
git commit -m "Start neighborhood guide"
try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.instructions: Inside `neighborhood-guide/`, type `git init -b main` and press Enter. Type `git config --local user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner"` and press Enter. Type `git config --local user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local"` and press Enter. Type `git add README.md pages/welcome.html pages/contact.txt notes/old-phone-tree.txt` and press Enter. Then type `git commit -m "Start neighborhood guide"` and press Enter.

try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.title: Update the Help Desk Hours
try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.prompt: Open `neighborhood-guide/pages/contact.txt`. Replace `Help desk hours: 10 AM - 4 PM` with `Help desk hours: 9 AM - 5 PM`. Save it. Type `git diff -- pages/contact.txt` and press Enter. Type `git add pages/contact.txt` and press Enter. Then type `git commit -m "Update help desk hours"` and press Enter.
try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.hint: Replace only the supplied hours line before applying the Git workflow.

help.concept: An exact text edit becomes a focused capstone commit.
help.hint_1: Do not change the filename or add other text.

try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.prompt: In the Explorer, create `neighborhood-guide/.gitignore`. Enter exactly `generated/` on line 1 and save it. Type `mkdir -p generated` and press Enter. Type `touch generated/preview.html` and press Enter. Type `git status --short --ignored` and press Enter. Then type `git add .gitignore` and press Enter.
try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.hint: Create the exact one-line ignore file, then create the supplied local preview path.

help.concept: The ignore policy is intentional project source; the generated preview is not.

try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.title: Clean Tracked Paths and Recover a Mistake
try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.prompt: Open `neighborhood-guide/README.md`. Find the exact line `Local services and contact information.` and replace it with `Accidental rewrite.` Save the file. Type `git add README.md` and press Enter. Type `git mv pages/welcome.html pages/getting-help.html` and press Enter. Type `git rm notes/old-phone-tree.txt` and press Enter. Type `git restore --staged README.md` and press Enter. Type `git restore README.md` and press Enter. Then type `git diff --staged --name-status` and press Enter.
try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.hint: Make only the supplied temporary README edit, then recover it while keeping the intended handoff cleanup staged.

help.concept: Independent Git work means protecting the desired snapshot while removing one accidental change.
help.hint_2: Do not disturb the rename, removal, or .gitignore.

try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.prompt: Type `git commit -m "Prepare neighborhood guide handoff"` and press Enter. Type `git log --oneline` and press Enter. Type `git show --stat --oneline HEAD` and press Enter. Then type `git status --short` and press Enter.
try_final_neighborhood_resource_guide_hi.hint: Record the final staged purpose, then audit history, snapshot, and state.

help.concept: The final handoff is proven by focused history, intentional tracked files, ignored generated output, and clean state.
help.hint_1: Use the exact final commit message.
help.hint_2: The final short status should print no file lines.

intro.title: Fresh Repository, Independent Transfer
intro.bodyMarkdown: The capstone starts in `neighborhood-guide/` with no history from the other projects. File edits are still supplied exactly because this is a Git assessment. Your responsibility is to apply initialization, focused history, path maintenance, ignore rules, safe restore, and final verification across six cumulative steps.
